chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-291 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A. 4476/2023 3. For hearing of main case 21.10.2024 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Khoso Advocate for Applicant. The Applicant has sought to impugn the Order dated 05.04.2023 made by the Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad, dismissing Criminal Revision No.09/2023 preferred against the Orders dated 17.01.2023 & 27.01.2023 passed by the learned Judicial Magistrate-I, Daulatpur, granting bail to the Respondent No.1. On examination, the orders in question appear to be unexceptionable inasmuch as the FIR in question relates to offences that are all bailable. Under such circumstances, this Application under Section 561-A Cr.P.C appears to be misconceived and is dismissed accordingly along with the other Miscellaneous Application. JUDGE Ali Haider
